templates.title: SaaS Landing Page
templates.description: Modern SaaS page with aurora hero, bento features, glass pricing, and gradient CTA
templates.prompt: Build a modern SaaS landing page with an aurora gradient hero section, bento-style feature cards, glassmorphic pricing table with 3 tiers, customer testimonials, FAQ accordion, and a glowing gradient CTA. Use dark theme with indigo/violet palette. Make it conversion-focused.

templates.title: Minimal SaaS Page
templates.description: Clean, light SaaS page focused on clarity and whitespace
templates.prompt: Build a minimal SaaS landing page with a clean light hero, simple 3-column feature grid with icons, a stats counter section, minimal testimonial cards, a simple pricing comparison, and a clean CTA banner. Use a light theme with blue accent colors and plenty of whitespace.

templates.title: AI Product Page
templates.description: Futuristic AI product showcase with animated gradients and tech feel
templates.prompt: Build an AI product landing page with a dark gradient hero featuring animated aurora background, a 'How it Works' process steps section, bento grid showcasing AI capabilities, social proof logos marquee, gradient stats counters, testimonial wall, pricing with popular badge, and a split CTA section. Use dark theme with cyan and purple accents for a futuristic tech feel.

templates.title: Business Landing Page
templates.description: Professional business page with trust signals and clear value proposition
templates.prompt: Build a professional business landing page with a split hero (text + image), logo bar of trusted clients, 4-column feature grid with icons, a large stats/numbers section, team member cards, customer testimonials, and a strong CTA banner. Use a professional blue and slate color palette with light theme.

templates.title: Product Launch Page
templates.description: Exciting product launch with countdown feel and bold visuals
templates.prompt: Build a product launch landing page with a bold dark hero section featuring gradient text, a feature showcase with alternating image-text rows, a benefits bento grid, early-access signup CTA, testimonials from beta users, FAQ section, and a final urgency-driven CTA. Use dark theme with vibrant orange and amber accents.

templates.title: Mobile App Landing
templates.description: App download page with device mockups and feature highlights
templates.prompt: Build a mobile app landing page with a centered hero with app screenshot, a scrolling feature highlights section with icons, a step-by-step 'How It Works' with numbered cards, user review testimonials, app stats counters, and a download CTA with app store badges. Use a vibrant gradient theme with purple and pink accents.

templates.title: Fashion Store
templates.description: Elegant fashion storefront with featured collections and lookbook
templates.prompt: Build a fashion e-commerce landing page with a full-width hero image section, featured collection grid, new arrivals showcase, a brand story section with media and text, Instagram-style gallery grid, newsletter signup, and a minimal footer. Use an elegant dark theme with gold accent colors for luxury feel.

templates.title: Product Showcase
templates.description: Single product focused page with features, reviews, and purchase CTA
templates.prompt: Build a single product showcase page with a large hero section featuring the product name and tagline, a feature grid highlighting key benefits, comparison table vs competitors, customer review cards, a FAQ section about the product, and a sticky purchase CTA. Use a clean light theme with emerald accents.

templates.title: Creative Portfolio
templates.description: Bold creative portfolio with masonry gallery and case studies
templates.prompt: Build a creative portfolio page with a minimal hero showing name and title, a masonry-style project gallery, featured case study cards with descriptions, an about section with skills, client testimonials, and a contact CTA. Use a dark theme with subtle warm accents and plenty of visual breathing room.

templates.title: Developer Portfolio
templates.description: Clean developer portfolio with tech stack and project cards
templates.prompt: Build a developer portfolio page with a dark code-themed hero with gradient text, a tech stack icons grid, featured project cards with descriptions and links, an experience timeline section, GitHub-style contribution stats, and a contact form section. Use dark slate theme with green accent like a terminal.

templates.title: Magazine Blog
templates.description: Content-rich blog layout with featured posts and category sections
templates.prompt: Build a blog magazine page with a large featured post hero, a grid of recent articles with thumbnails and excerpts, category section headers, an author spotlight card, newsletter signup banner, and a popular posts sidebar-style section. Use a clean light theme with a warm serif feel and indigo accents.

templates.title: Personal Blog
templates.description: Simple personal blog with about section and recent posts
templates.prompt: Build a personal blog page with a friendly hero section with avatar and bio, recent blog post cards in a clean grid, a popular tags section, an about-me media-text section, and a newsletter signup. Use a warm light theme with soft rounded corners and rose/amber accents.

templates.title: Modern Restaurant
templates.description: Upscale restaurant page with menu, gallery, and reservations
templates.prompt: Build a modern restaurant page with a full-width cover hero with restaurant name, a story/about section with side image, a featured menu grid with categories, a photo gallery section, customer reviews, and a reservation CTA with location map details. Use a dark elegant theme with warm gold and amber accents for an upscale dining feel.

templates.title: Casual Dining
templates.description: Fun casual restaurant page with specials and social vibe
templates.prompt: Build a casual restaurant page with a vibrant hero section, daily specials feature cards, a picture menu grid, social media reviews section, location and hours info, and an order-online CTA. Use a warm light theme with orange and red accents for an inviting, casual dining feel.

templates.title: Creative Agency
templates.description: Bold agency site with case studies, team, and services
templates.prompt: Build a creative agency page with a glassmorphic dark hero, services bento grid, featured case study cards with hover effects, team member grid, client logo marquee, testimonials, process steps, and a bold CTA section. Use dark theme with vibrant gradient accents. Use the agency-portfolio blueprint.

templates.title: Consulting Firm
templates.description: Professional consulting page with expertise areas and results
templates.prompt: Build a consulting firm page with a professional split hero, expertise areas in a 3-column grid, results/stats counter section, case study previews, team leadership cards, client testimonials, and a consultation booking CTA. Use a light professional theme with navy and slate blue palette.

templates.title: Startup MVP Page
templates.description: Early-stage startup page with waitlist signup and vision
templates.prompt: Build a startup MVP landing page with a bold gradient hero with waitlist email signup, a problem-solution section, 3 key feature cards, early traction stats/logos, founder quote testimonial, a roadmap/timeline section, and a final waitlist CTA. Use dark theme with vibrant blue-to-purple gradient accents.

templates.title: Investor Page
templates.description: Fundraising page with metrics, traction, and team credibility
templates.prompt: Build a startup investor/fundraising page with a clean hero showing the mission statement, key metrics counter section, market opportunity content block, product screenshots or demo section, traction and growth stats, team cards with credentials, press logos, and a contact CTA. Use a clean light theme with emerald and teal accents to convey growth.

templates.title: Event Landing Page
templates.description: Conference or event page with speakers, schedule, and registration
templates.prompt: Build an event landing page with a dark gradient hero showing event name and date, speaker lineup cards, event schedule/agenda section, venue information with map, sponsor logo grid, early bird pricing section, and a registration CTA. Use a dark theme with electric blue and cyan accents for an energetic tech-event feel.

templates.title: Photography Portfolio
templates.description: Visual-first portfolio with full-width gallery and minimal text
templates.prompt: Build a photography portfolio page with a full-width hero image, a masonry photo gallery section, about the photographer media-text block, service packages pricing, client testimonials, and a booking contact CTA. Use a minimal dark theme with very subtle warm accents, letting the imagery be the focus.
